name: algebras-agent
description: AI translation workflow with automated QA and fluency scoring via Algebras.

interface.shortDescription: Translation workflows with QA and fluency scoring.
interface.longDescription: Install the Algebras translation workflow in Codex, copy reusable agent instructions into a localization project, and connect Codex to Algebras MCP tools for fluency QA.
defaultPrompt: Use Algebras Agent to set up this translation project.
Translate this project and run fluency QA with Algebras.
